CustomField.formula: Basic_Price1__c + (East_Facing_Charges__c * Saleable_Area_Sft__c) + (Corner_Charges__c * Saleable_Area_Sft__c) + (Hi_Rise_Charges__c * Saleable_Area_Sft__c) + (Central_Court_Yard_Premium__c * Saleable_Area_Sft__c) + (Meadow_Premium__c * Saleable_Area_Sft__c) + (Roadside_Premium__c * Saleable_Area_Sft__c) + (Court_Yard_Premium__c * Saleable_Area_Sft__c) + (Outer_Premium__c * Saleable_Area_Sft__c) + Amenities_Car_Parking__c + Infrastructure_Charges__c
CustomField.label: Sub total
